calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been from November 17, 2014 for a continued hearing for Uncontested Trial/Defendant failed to appear for Trial.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Plaintiff Mark Perlmutter, Esq., appearing on his own behalf.
Daniel R. Sterrett, Esq., specially appearing for Defendant Eduardo Alarcon. Defendant Eduardo Alarcon not present in court.
Defendant Eduardo Alarcon motion to continued Trial is denied by the court. Defendant failed to appear last Monday November 17, 2014 when this Trial commenced.
Plaintiff Mark Perlmutter sworn and examined on his own behalf.
The following Exhibits previously marked were identified for the record as follows:
Exhibit 3. 2 Page Statement by Plaintiff "To whom it may concern". Id.
Exhibit 4. NOv. 20, 2013 copy of e-mail. Id.
Exhibit 5. Letter dated 1/14/14 from Alarcon to Thomas J. Bender. Id.
Exhibit 6. 1/24/2014 to Eduardo Alarcon from Board of Psychology. Id.
Exhibit 7. 3/1/13 State Bar of Texas. Id.
Exhibit 8. 1/14/2014 to State Bar of Texas. Id.
Exhibit 9. 1/14/2014 Board of Psychology. Id.
Exhibit 10. Copy of envelope to Kathy Lum. Id.
Exhibit 11. Single page similar to Exhibit 10 to W. Keith Sutton. Id.
Exhibit 12. Single page State Bar of Texas 2/12/2014. Id.
Exhibit 13. Single page copy of Internet Web-site or page. Id.
Exhibit 14. 3 page document dated 12/9/2013. Id.
Exhibit 15. Copy of Motion to Dismiss. Id.
Exhibit 16. Document filed United States Court/Texas. Id.

After argument of counsel the court ordered matter under submission.

First Amended Mtn To Dismiss
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MARK L. PERLMUTTER, TEL. NO. 857-4065, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
EDUARDO ALARCON, TEL. NO. (512)217-6655, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDUARDO ALARCON'S First Amended Motion To Dismiss is Denied. Defendant's motion sets forth no legal basis for dismissing the case. Defendant's motion does not conform to the requirements for a motion for summary judgment set forth in CCP sec. 437c. Defendant sets forth no admissible evidence in support of his contention that California lacks personal jurisdiction over him. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Continued To Nov-24-14 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Self-Represented Plaintiff Mark L. Perlmutter appearing on his own behalf.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Eduardo Alarcon.
Plaintiff Mark L. Perlmutter sworn on his own behalf. Alexix Perlmutter sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Defendants Does 1 - 10 dismissed without prejudice.
The following exhibits were introduced by the Plaintiff and marked as follows:
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1. 4 page typed written document dated June 24, 2012. Id.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2. Multi-page document for Identification.
On Order of the court Plaintiff's Exhibits 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9 were marked and will be identified for the record on November 24, 2014.
Court ordered matter continued to November 24, 2014 at 11:00 AM, in Department 514.
Court adjourned.

First Amended Mtn To Dismiss
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Continued To Nov-20-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT EDUARDO ALARCON's First Amended Motion To Dismiss is continued to November 20, 2014. The court did not receive the moving parties' courtesy copies in sufficient time to prepare a tentative ruling. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Mtn To Dismiss
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - EDUARDO ALARCON, TEL. NO. (512) 217-6655, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDUARDO ALARCON's Motion To Dismiss is Off calendar. A First Amended Motion to Dismiss was filed on August 1, 2014. The Amended Motion is now the operative motion and was filed less than 16 court days prior to the hearing date, rendering it untimely. (CCP 1005(b).) Plaintiff was not afforded an opportunity to respond to the Amended Motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

Motion To Dismiss (First Amended)
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - EDUARDO ALARCON, TEL. NO. (512) 217-6655, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDUARDO ALARCON's Motion To Dismiss (First Amended) - The Motion is off calendar as moot in light of the First Amended Motion to Dismiss filed on August 1, 2014. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)
